data.title: ASIC secures $9.3M fine for BPS Financial for deceptive Qoin Wallet, $1.3M unlicensed, $8M misleading conduct.
data.description: BPS Financial has been directed by the Federal Court in Australia to compensate $1.3 million due to unauthorized activities and an additional $8 million for making false and misleading statements.

data.title: NFU Mutual partners with Guidewire (NYSE: GWRE) to migrate InsuranceSuite to Cloud Platform, improving service. Leading UK rural insurer with 900,000 members.
data.description: In London, NFU Mutual and Guidewire (NYSE: GWRE) have unveiled plans to enhance their enduring partnership with NFU Mutual deciding to transition their on-premises utilization of Guidewire InsuranceSuite to Guidewire Cloud Platform. As the UK's foremost rural insurance provider owned by 900,000 members, NFU Mutual provides various insurance offerings such as home, motor, and business coverage. Collaborating for over 15 years, Guidewire and NFU Mutual are reinforcing their collaboration in a significant strategic move.

data.title: India and the European Union seal "the mother of all trade deals" after two decades of negotiations in Trump's era.
data.description: After nearly two decades of discussions, both parties have reached a comprehensive agreement that officials are hailing as "the ultimate trade deal."

data.title: LanzaTech received contract from SED to build an ethanol facility in India using sugarcane bagasse for sustainable fuels.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, in Skokie, Illinois, LanzaTech Global, Inc (LNZA) was granted a contract by Spray Engineering Devices Ltd (SED) for constructing an advanced ethanol plant. The facility will utilize sugarcane bagasse, a common agricultural byproduct, to produce eco-friendly fuels and chemicals. This marks a significant step towards sustainable energy solutions.

data.title: Sandvik reported a Q4 order intake of SEK 32,717M, revenues of SEK 32,461M, and an adjusted EBITA of SEK 6,373M.
data.description: In Stockholm, on January 27, 2026, an order intake of SEK 32,717 million (31,562) was reported, showing a 15% increase at fixed exchange rates. Revenues amounted to SEK 32,461 million (32,151), with revenue growth of 12% at fixed exchange rates. The adjusted EBITA stood at SEK 6,373 million (6,288) in the specified period.
